zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：[弱势震荡偏空]
zh.content:
趋势判断：AVAX/USD当前价格贴近6.43附近日内低位区域，整体走势呈现窄幅震荡偏弱结构，反弹力度有限，多头缺乏持续推动力，市场短期仍以整理回落节奏为主。

技术指标显示MACD维持微弱正值但动能不足，价格持续运行在SMA20均线下方，说明中期趋势仍偏空，均线压制明显，反弹更多属于技术修复而非趋势反转信号。

支撑位关注6.43短期低点，一旦失守可能进一步下探6.30区域；上方阻力集中在6.55附近SMA20及6.70区域，需放量突破才能改善结构，否则仍受压制。

交易策略建议以区间操作为主，靠近6.43可轻仓试多并严格止损，反弹至6.55-6.60分批止盈；若跌破支撑则顺势短空跟随趋势，控制仓位避免追单。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently exhibiting a very tight consolidation phase around 6.44, with price action compressed into an extremely narrow intraday range. This behavior typically reflects low volatility and a temporary equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the slight 24-hour uptick, the broader structure remains mildly bearish as price trades below the 20-day SMA, suggesting that short-term momentum is still capped and recovery attempts lack follow-through strength.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but slightly fragile outlook. The MACD reading above zero at 0.0224 suggests a minimal bullish impulse is emerging, yet the absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation of a trend shift. With RSI unavailable, momentum clarity is reduced. Price trading below the SMA(20) at 6.55649 reinforces short-term bearish pressure and indicates that upside recovery remains technically constrained unless sustained volume expansion occurs.

Immediate support is located near 6.4313, aligning closely with the recent session low and forming a critical short-term floor. A breakdown below this zone could expose the 6.40 psychological level as the next downside target. On the upside, resistance is positioned at the SMA(20) around 6.55649, followed by stronger supply near 6.70, where previous rallies have tended to stall and profit-taking typically intensifies.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound approach given the compressed volatility. Short-term traders may consider accumulation near the 6.43 support zone with tight risk management below 6.40, while partial profit-taking can be considered near SMA(20) resistance. A confirmed breakout above 6.56 with volume would signal potential trend reversal toward higher resistance levels. Conversely, sustained rejection below 6.43 would increase downside continuation risk.
